---
description: "Generate a complete High-Level Design (HLD) solution. Delegates to the hld-solution skill."
agent: "agent"
argument-hint: "Company name and HLD problem (e.g., PayPal Design a URL Shortener)"
---

Use the **hld-solution** skill to generate this HLD solution. Read the skill's SKILL.md at `.github/skills/hld-solution/SKILL.md` and follow its format exactly, using the sample at `.github/skills/hld-solution/examples/sample-hld.md` as the gold-standard reference.
